prompt: Create a movie poster featuring the two people from the first image in their current pose, with the black spider logo from the second image centered behind them as a background motif, and the title styled like the third image with the text: 'The Amazing Spider-Man'.
prompt_refined: Generate a movie poster. The poster should feature the two individuals from image 1 (a man on the right with a backpack, and a woman on the left in a light pink coat) maintaining their natural poses and expressions, looking at each other. Centered behind them, as a prominent background motif, incorporate the black spider logo from image 2. The movie title, 'THE AMAZING SPIDER-MAN', should be placed in the lower-middle section of the poster, precisely replicating the font style, capitalization, and stacked layout of the title from image 3.
objects: Man from image 1, on the right, with a backpack
Woman from image 1, on the left, in a light pink coat
Man and woman looking at each other
Black spider logo from image 2, centered behind the man and woman
The text "THE AMAZING SPIDER-MAN", in the lower-middle section
Font style of "LITTLE WOMEN" from image 3 for the movie title
Capitalization of "LITTLE WOMEN" from image 3 for the movie title
Stacked layout of "LITTLE WOMEN" from image 3 for the movie title
